auto.description: Prompt-engineering orchestrator on Kimi K2.5 - engineers every request into structured instructions and routes to specialized agents. Best economy-performance ratio.

auto-fallback.description: Direct handler using Claude Opus 4.6 via GitHub Copilot - handles work directly when Kimi/GLM-5 agents fail

architect.description: Designs system architecture, component structure, and technical decisions

executor.description: Implements code changes, writes new features, and executes build tasks

debugger.description: Investigates bugs, analyzes errors, and fixes issues in the codebase

auditor.description: Reviews code quality, security, performance, and best practices

planner.description: Creates implementation plans, breaks down tasks, and defines execution order. Outputs structured instruction blocks for target agents.

mapper.description: Explores and maps codebase structure, dependencies, and architecture

reasoner.description: Performs deep analysis, logical reasoning, and complex problem solving

verifier.description: Verifies implementations against requirements, runs tests, and validates correctness

docs-manager.description: Creates and maintains documentation, READMEs, changelogs, and inline docs

git-manager.description: Manages git operations, commits, branches, PRs, and GitHub workflows

advocate.description: Proposes and champions the best approach in Discussion Protocol debates - argues for solutions with evidence

critic.description: Stress-tests proposals in Discussion Protocol debates - finds weaknesses, challenges assumptions, plays devil's advocate

synthesizer.description: Final decision-maker in Discussion Protocol debates - weighs advocate vs critic arguments and produces unified actionable decision
